content.problemStatement:
You are given two squares A and B. The square A has a side length of aaa and B has a side length of bbb. The left-bottom point of square A is at (0,0)(0, 0)(0,0) and the top-right at (a,a)(a, a)(a,a). Square B's left-bottom point is (x,y)(x, y)(x,y) and top-right is (x+b,y+b)(x + b, y + b)(x+b,y+b). It's guaranteed that square B lies inside square A (may not be strictly inside, can touch too). In other words, 0‚â§x,0‚â§y,(x+b‚â§a,y+b‚â§a)0 \leq x, 0 \leq y, (x + b \leq a, y + b \leq a)0‚â§x,0‚â§y,(x+b‚â§a,y+b‚â§a).

You have to tell whether you can construct a triangle T such that:


All the vertices of the triangle lie on the boundary of square A.
One of its sides is parallel to one of the sides of the square A and this side should contain one of the sides of square B as a subsegment. That is, there should be a side of the triangle, say T2T3T_2T_3T2‚ÄãT3‚Äã, which is parallel to one of the sides of square A, and which contains a side of square B, say Q3Q4Q_3Q_4Q3‚ÄãQ4‚Äã. That is, the line segment Q3Q4Q_3Q_4Q3‚ÄãQ4‚Äã should lie within the line segment T2T3T_2T_3T2‚ÄãT3‚Äã.
Square B is inside the triangle T (is allowed to touch the sides of T, but shouldn‚Äôt go outside the triangle T).

Input Format

The first line of the input contains an integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of the test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains four space-separated integers a,b,x,ya, b, x, ya,b,x,y.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing the string `yes` if it is possible to construct such a triangle, or `no` if it is impossible.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Testcase 1: The following figure shows one possible way in which the triangle can be constructed:
![Testcase 2](https://codechef_shared.s3.amazonaws.com/download/Images/TST18KGP/SQRTRI/1.png =475x475)
Square A is P1 P2 P3 P4, square B is Q1 Q2 Q3 Q4 and the constructed triangle T is T1 T2 T3.
Testcase 2: The following figure shows one possible way in which the triangle can be constructed:
![Testcase 2](https://codechef_shared.s3.amazonaws.com/download/Images/TST18KGP/SQRTRI/2.png =475x475)
Square A is P1 P2 P3 P4, square B is Q1 Q2 Q3 Q4 and the constructed triangle T is T1 T2 T3.
